description_long: This object depicts a highly distorted figure of a firefighter, characterized by an elongated, stretched body and limbs that radiate outward in unnatural proportions. The head is topped with a bright red firefighter helmet featuring a yellow badge, which is the most recognizable element. The torso and arms are fused into a single, warped mass, with the arms extending horizontally and blending into the surrounding structure. The surface appears smooth and shiny, with a golden-yellow coloration dominating the body and limbs. The figure lacks clear details of typical firefighter turnout gear, such as a coat, pants, or boots, and there are no visible reflective stripes or insignia. The overall form is abstract and surreal, making it difficult to discern functional or interactive parts.
description: A surreal, elongated firefighter figure with a red helmet and gold-yellow, stretched limbs, lacking clear turnout gear or details.
description_view_0: Front view showing the firefighter's red helmet and the extremely elongated, golden body and arms radiating outward.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the helmet and the stretched, tapering body extending diagonally downward.
description_view_2: Rear view with the back of the red helmet visible and the golden limbs extending outward in a warped fashion.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the helmet profile and the elongated, golden body stretching away from the head.
